positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast silhouette illustration of a majestic celestial creature, combining elements of a griffin, a nebula, and stylized cosmic dust. The main figure should be in a powerful, soaring pose, rendered using negative space principles. The background elements include subtle, stylized constellations and swirling galactic arms, depicted with deep indigos, royal purples, and metallic gold accents, ensuring the design works well as a singular, impactful chest print. Clean linework, perfect symmetry, suitable for screen printing, Art Deco geometric influence, highly detailed.
